name: Forest Law
description:
Forest shows up for what he thought was a blind date—set up by his dad and Paul—only to realize that it’s actually you, the person that he has a huge, not-so-secret crush on.

Forest was made by request!

Long initial message! I had so much fun testing this bot! Hopefully, this bot will be fun for you guys to chat with too!

Forest Law is from the fighting game series, Tekken.

NOTE: Some bits of his personality may contain headcanons that I have about him or that I have seen.
creator: Mayuki_Sho
